mapper.sql: role_id, role_name, display_name, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, deleted, created_by, updated_by, deleted_by
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_role WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM t_role WHERE role_name = #{roleName} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM t_role WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_role
role_name = #{roleName}, display_name = #{displayName}, description = #{description}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_role SET deleted = 1, deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM t_role WHERE role_name = #{roleName} AND deleted = 0
